title: Avoid Unnecessary Exception Catch
description: Catching Exception seems like an efficient way to handle multiple possible exceptions. Unfortunately, it traps all exception types, both checked and runtime exceptions, thereby casting too broad a net. This rule raises an issue if Exception is caught when it is not explicitly thrown by a method in the try block.
recommendation: Explicitly list expected exceptions in the catch clause
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and code complexity

checks.message: Explicitly list expected exceptions in the catch clause
